summary:
Bristle stiffness depends on their size; larger diameters or longer lengths result in firmer brushes that can impact cleaning effectiveness significantly. Agent1 correctly identified how dimensions affect brush performance but did not explicitly mention material properties which could also influence flexibility/stiffness despite focusing primarily on structural aspects related directly to the requirements posed by the question about nylon toothbrushes' bristle rigidity.

- Material type such as nylon inherently affects basic elasticity alongside these dimensional attributes determining final product feel & functionality during use.
